title: townsendia formosa
intro: Townsendia formosa, also known as the Formosa Townsendia or Formosa dwarf sunflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Townsendia formosa is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its roots are sometimes dried and used in herbal remedies.
